Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of The Claim Or Action Of The Minor, Isabella Lewis
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been continued from Tuesday, October 26, 2021, for a specially set hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of the Claim or Action of the Minor, Isabella Lewis.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Ilya D. Frangos, Esq. appeared with petitioner Jasmine Herrera, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Isabella Lewis, who was not present.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
American Sign Language interpreters Stacey Sharpe and Doreen Simmons assisted Ms. Herrera during this morning's hearing.
Gina Huettel, Esq. appeared for defendant Justin, Chang, who was not present.
Petitioner, counsel and the ASL interpreters all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $100,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $20,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $2,241.99.

The net balance of $77,758.01 shall be used to purchase an annuity with Pacific Life & Annuity Services, Inc., with guaranteed periodic payments to the minor as set forth below:

$15,000.00 guaranteed lump sum payment on 11/30/2035 - age 18;
$30,000.00 guaranteed lump sum payment on 11/30/2037 - age 20; and
$72,151.17 guarenteed lump sum payment on 11/30/2039 - age 22.

Counsel shall prepare the proposed Order Approving the Compromise of the Claim or Action of the Minor and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 4, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for a Progress Report on the purchase of the Annuity.
